{{Quote|On Yn, the Jedi had laid siege to an Imperial stronghold. Tulak Hord broke the siege single-handedly!|Khem Val|<ref name="Exultation">{{TORcite|type=conversation|Khem Val|Exultation}}</ref>}}
'''Yn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yn system/Legends|Yn system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="Atlas" /> Around [[5300 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{TORcite|type=codex|Force-walking}} establishes that [[Ergast]] attempted [[Tulak Hord's ritual]] 300 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after [[Tulak Hord]] himself. Additionally, {{TORcite|type=codex|Monument to Lord Ergast}} states that [[Ergast]] was among the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] who first permanently settled [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]], which occurred in [[4980 BBY]] per ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''. Thus, Hord's [[Battle of Chabosh|use]] of the ritual at [[Chabosh]], and by extension the battles of [[Yn]] and Chabosh, occurred around [[5300 BBY]].</ref> the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] laid siege to an [[Sith Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stronghold at the [[battle of Yn]]. [[Tulak Hord]], [[Ortan Cela]], [[Khem Val]], and [[Veshikk Urk]]<ref name="The Master's Apprentice">{{TORcite|type=conversation|Khem Val|The Master's Apprentice}}</ref> broke the siege with their army of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] warriors. Hord and [[Khem Val]] fed on the [[Living Force/Legends|energies]] of the fallen [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-users]] using an ancient [[Tulak Hord's ritual|Sith ritual]].<ref name="Ritual">{{TORcite|type=codex|The Ritual of Tulak Hord}}</ref> Millennia later, Yn was represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] by [[Wwebyls]], a tiny [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]].<ref name="TNR">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
